kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan in Eastcheap's levy is higher than both Beatrix and the Fletcher.
Wulfric's levy is higher than both the Mason and the artisan in Millpond.
More members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the Hill Ward than members of the Ironmongers' Guild.
The Potter does not belong to the South Side if and only if Aldric goes with Fletcher.
Between Carpenter and 7 coins, one goes with Highrow and the other with Millpond.
Blacksmith goes with at least two of Aldric, Oldwall, and 13 coins.
More members of the River Ward are in the Joiners' Guild than members of the Hill Ward.
Highrow goes with exactly one of Godfrey, Blacksmith, or 11 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Rowan goes with Potter; Fletcher goes with 11 coins; Mason goes with 9 coins.
Rowan's levy is at most 3 coins away from the artisan in Highrow.
Someone in the North Side goes with Beatrix if and only if Carpenter goes with Godfrey.
Between Tanner and Riverside, one goes with Aldric and the other with Cedric.
15 coins goes with at most one of Wulfric, Carpenter, and Eastcheap.
